title: Magical Chaos
description: A modpack containing a little bit of everything, resulting in quite some magical chaos
body:
!["Magical Chaos" MC Title Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0353e4ce18a2ca71e080577b447ef4dd8365c1b5.png)
My first modpack containing a large amount of mods, each one containing many different features. All of these allow for a unique and fun experience!

# ----- Features ----- 
- **_Cook some nice meals_** for your friends! (friends are not included in this pack)
- **_Explore the vast areas of space, and even find some otherworldly inhabitants!_**
- Explore some caves and **_find some funky items! (after fighting a fake chest, of course)_**
- Take a bit of gunpowder, **_make a few bombs, and blow up a nearby cave!_** Or your friends house, if you're a chaotic type!
- **_Uncover ancient fossils_**, and maybe even open a museum!
- Complete some quests from the **_bounty board_** of villages, and earn some sweet rewards!
- Explore the vast areas of the overworld, and find the **_completely revamped structures!_**
- You should probably try and get used to the **_new enchanting system_**, as it's been completely revamped!
- **_Take some photos_** to remember some of the moments you have in this world!
- Did you fall to your death on the way down a hill because you failed the water bucket clutch? No problem! Just yell to your friend in the **_voice chat_**, and hope they hear you so **_they can revive you!_** Or you'll just have to respawn like normal.
- **_Fly around the world with newfound air travel!_** This includes a biplane, airship, and gyrodyne!
- **_Choose an origin_** to explore the world with new abilities!
- Get to important landmarks easily with **_waystones_**!

## ----- FAQ -----
> **Q:** Does this modpack support multiplayer?
> 
> **A:** I have only gotten the chance to test on singleplayer, but it is very likely to be compatible. If any issues arise, feel free to contact me on Discord (see below) and let me know what happened.

> **Q:** How often will this pack be updated?
> 
> **A:** There is not really a schedule. It's mainly a "whenever I feel like it". If there is a game breaking bug, I will try my best to release a patch whenever I can.


## ----- Contact Me -----
Contact me on Discord if you would like to submit feedback, have any mods you think would work with this, have any bugs you want to report, or anything else! (_statuszer0)
